title: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
headline: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
subtitle: Mission Creator Updates
content:
The latest Mission Creator updates include new props, actor models, and more.

Craft survivals with bloodthirsty zombies, build parkour courses with sliding and rotating props, add warp points to teleport players to different areas, and more.

There are also new stealth systems, including disguises and CCTV cameras for players to experiment with.

Bring your artistic vision to life with cutscene enhancements for more creative scene-setting and narrative-building.
